# Hexago Logistics and Transport

> Hexago Logistics and Transport is a professionally managed B2B logistics and transportation company based in Aluva, Ernakulam, Kerala, India. We provide end-to-end freight and supply chain solutions across India.

## About

Founded by Harisankar U (Founder & Owner) and Akshay Raj K (CEO & Co-Founder), Hexago Logistics delivers reliable, cost-effective freight movement for businesses of all sizes. Our operations span 2 warehouse locations, 1,000+ pincodes served, and 2 states.

## Services

- **Full Truck Load (FTL)**: Dedicated truck capacity for large-volume shipments across India.
- **Partial Truck Load (PTL)**: Flexible freight solutions for smaller consignments.
- **3PL Warehousing**: Third-party logistics storage, inventory management, and order fulfilment.
- **4PL Logistics**: End-to-end supply chain management and coordination.
- **Supply Chain Management**: Strategic logistics planning, route optimisation, and visibility.
- **Freight Services**: Cargo handling, freight coordination, and timely delivery.

## Sectors Served

Retail, FMCG, Healthcare, Manufacturing, E-commerce, Automobile.

## Location

- **Head Office**: Aluva, Ernakulam, Kerala — PIN 683 101, India
- **Warehouse Locations**: Kerala (2 facilities)
